name: Jauquil Mason
ai_summary: Jauquil has over 20 years of experience working with children through camp counseling and substitute teaching. He brings positive energy and proven conflict resolution skills to create supportive learning environments.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Jack. Well, Mason, and I have experience working with children. I volunteer with a camp for kids with sickle cell. It is a five-day four-night overnight camp and I am a counselor and have been a counselor kid with kids aged 7 to 17.
 I also have experience as a substitute teacher and the Fulton.
 County School System area. I also have subbed out in Clayton, County and I have been working with children for over 20 years.
 Thank you so much.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Atlanta, Georgia.
transcripts.q6:
How I have dealt with two kids, having a conflict. Is I make them come together? Normally, this is what I do with young kids.  A little back story and then resolve it and then hug it out at the end. Kind of how I
 We know your Works normally for the other kids, or the kids that would just read. This would have a conversation about it. You just kind of see, you know, what, the truth is, and what is not needed, and hopefully, resolve whatever the issue is.
 Peacefully.
